title: Allis Ultimate Tools
description: A simple lightweight mod that adds one tool to replace them all.
body:
![requires fabric api](https://mineload.ru/uploads/posts/2020-11/1605085083_fabric-api.png "Requires Fabric API")
### REQUIRES FABRIC API
# Alli's Ultimate Tools

Simply by combining an axe, hoe, shovel, pickaxe, sword, and shears, you can wield one tool that replaces all 6. Craft a ring to mount the tools to, then simply attach them.

## Keybinds and Recipes
Check out the Github wiki page [here](https://github.com/technoalli3/ultimatetools/wiki "here") to get all the information about default keybinds and recipes.
